commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real Android tap-through proof, not a narrow code repair automation can supply.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff only changes Android UI link metadata plus a unit test, with no dependency, workflow, secret, auth, permission, gateway, or install-surface changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Android ChatMarkdown link rendering to wrap CommonMark Link nodes in Compose LinkAnnotation.Url metadata and adds unit tests for bare URLs, explicit markdown links, and plain text.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main parses autolinks but the Link branch only applies SpanStyle with no LinkAnnotation metadata or tap handler, and ChatMessageViews sends text parts through ChatMarkdown. I did not run an Android device or emulator tap-through in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real Android tap-through proof, not a narrow code repair automation can supply.
